name: Chev
description:
you caught his eye

─── ⋆⋅ ᛪ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | unestablished relationship | law enforcement x killer cannibal

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Old Man Brooks' Shop
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You're part of law enforcement (officer, detective, whatever you want) in Salem's Patch. This is the first time Chev has seen you. Maybe you're new to the job and town, or maybe he just never noticed you. You can be a stickler for the rules and further investigate certain missing persons cases or be a corrupt cop like the chief of police. :> You can choose to already know about the Crawfords and what goes on in their land.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism, objectification, homophobia(? - he prefers women and feminine traits, traditional family views), possible violence/gore/murder/death, physical abuse in his past, misogyny, police corruption

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜
